overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene from a cyberpunk city at night, featuring holographic koi fish swimming through a neon-lit circular plaza surrounded by towering skyscrapers with digital billboards. The camera remains stationary as translucent blue and orange fish circle the plaza, creating a serene futuristic atmosphere.

tall dark buildings with various neon signs and illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a futuristic cyberpunk plaza at night, illuminated by cyan neon rings embedded in the circular ground platform. A large translucent blue holographic koi fish swims gracefully through the air in the center of the plaza, surrounded by towering skyscrapers covered in digital billboards.

segments.scene_description: The orange holographic koi fish enters from the left, joining the blue fish that is now swimming toward the right. Both fish swim in the air above the neon-lit plaza, their translucent bodies glowing against the dark city backdrop.

segments.scene_description: The orange fish now dominates the center-right of the plaza while the blue fish temporarily exits and then re-enters from the left. The two holographic fish continue their circular swimming patterns around the neon-lit platform.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular cyberpunk plaza with holographic display system

segments.scene_description: The blue fish returns to the center of the plaza while the orange fish re-enters from the left. Both holographic koi continue their graceful circular swimming patterns around the neon-lit cyberpunk plaza as the scene concludes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a serene, continuous loop of holographic life within a neon-lit cyberpunk plaza at night. It begins with a single translucent blue koi fish swimming gracefully above cyan neon rings, framed by towering skyscrapers and glowing digital billboards. As the camera holds its position, an orange holographic koi enters from the left to join the blue fish, their glowing bodies contrasting against the dark city backdrop. The scene then shifts as the fish weave in and out of the frame, with the orange fish dominating the center-right while the blue fish momentarily exits and re-enters from the left. Finally, both holographic koi converge once more in the center of the plaza, continuing their fluid, circular swimming patterns around the illuminated platform.
